Under the watchful and demanding eyes of their instructors, they discover what it takes to become Starfleet officers as they navigate blossoming friendships, explosive rivalries, first loves and a new enemy that threatens both the Academy and the Federation itself.

Samuel warns him that the world is in danger, leading Ulises to confront his past, technological advances, and the fundamental question: how far can we go without losing what makes us human?

Directors and emerging talents Harrison Fishman and Dylan Redford filmed for over two years, traveling across the country and fully immersing themselves in these neighbors' lives to capture an unfiltered and intimate portrait of everyday people and document the fundamentally American pursuits of life, liberty, and property.

Along the way, the audience will witness her greatest refuge: the kitchen. Using extensive archives, intimate family interviews, each week Crime Beat reveals new details that go beyond the news headlines: giving a voice to victims and their families, unraveling how each case was solved through the eyes of the detectives and forensic specialists, and exploring lasting impacts on the community and justice system.

En plus des défis de sa réadaptation physique, la trentenaire doit encaisser le choc psychologique de se retrouver soudain dans une époque qu’elle ne comprend pas. Audrey doit réapprendre à vivre à tous les niveaux, avec le vécu d’une adolescente dans le corps d’une femme de 35 ans. Le mystère reste entier sur ce qui est arrivé lors de cette fameuse nuit où tout a basculé. Pendant qu’Audrey tente de remettre les morceaux du casse-tête en place, son regard sur la vie change peu à peu celui des gens autour d’elle. Comme si, à son contact, chacun se réappropriait sa propre existence en réalisant l’immense plaisir d’être vivant.

events.title: America's Sweethearts: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders
events.desc: Follow the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders from auditions to training camp and the NFL season as they chase their dreams and a coveted spot on the squad.

events.title: Culpables: London
events.desc: When Noah's mother, Ella, falls in love with the very wealthy William, the two move from America to London to live with William and his son Nick. Upon arrival, the 18-year-old Noah meets bad boy Nick, and there is an immediate attraction between the two. Noah spends the summer adjusting to her new life, making new friends from Nick's various circles, and navigating a complicated relationship with him while they fight to keep the attraction at bay. Noah will ultimately be forced to deal with her devastating past while falling in love for the first time.

The Simpsons Specials
events.desc: A series featuring characters from The Simpsons in brand new short films.

events.desc: Buzz, Woody, Jessie et le reste de la bande verront leur travail remis en question lorsqu'ils découvriront que ce qui obsède les enfants d'aujourd'hui s’appelle... l'électronique !

events.title: BAKI-DOU: The Invincible Samurai
events.desc: Baki and the strongest Underground Arena fighters face a threat of historical proportions: the resurrected Musashi Miyamoto, Japan's greatest samurai.

events.desc: Harlan Coben's I Will Find You follows an innocent father serving life in prison for murdering his own son, who receives evidence that his child may actually still be alive — and must break out of prison to find the truth.

events.title: Leviticus
events.desc: Deux adolescents maudits par les étoiles doivent échapper à une entité violente qui prend la forme de la personne qu’ils désirent le plus — l’un l’autre.

events.title: Oasis
events.desc: Oasis is the most luxurious holiday resort in the country — a paradise reserved for the wealthiest families, featuring private beaches, VIP facilities, and impenetrable security. The perfect place to spend the best summer of your life. But everything falls apart when the police storm the resort to investigate a mysterious disappearance. In such an exclusive place, everyone is a suspect — and no one can leave until the culprit is found.

events.title: Várzea: Onde Nasce o Futebol
events.desc: Brazil lives, breathes and exports várzea. This series delves into the stories behind the beautiful game — one with the power to change lives.

events.title: House of the Dragon
events.desc: Set 200 years before the events of Game of Thrones, House of the Dragon tells the history of House Targaryen as they fight through a civil war.

trailers.label: House of the Dragon – Bande-Annonce officielle (VOST)

events.title: The Agency: Central Intelligence
events.desc: The Agency: Central Intelligence follows Martian, a covert CIA agent ordered to abandon his undercover life and return to London Station. When the love he left behind reappears, romance reignites. His career, his real identity and his mission are pitted against his heart; hurling them both into a deadly game of international intrigue and espionage.

trailers.label: The Agency | Bande-annonce officielle (Maintenant disponible sur CANAL+)

events.title: Bedaine
events.desc: Ancien superhéros brisé, Bedaine tente de retrouver un sens à sa vie dans son village natal. Entre ennemis loufoques, blessures profondes et ailes perdues, il découvrira qu’on peut être un héros autrement.

events.title: Des trains pas comme les autres , saison 14
Nuova Scena - Rhythm + Flow Italia
events.desc: In this music competition show, Fabri Fibra, Geolier and Rose Villain hit the streets of Rome, Naples and Milan to find the next Italian rap superstar.

events.title: Les stars de Gordon Ramsay UK , saison 2
Zeytin Ağacı
events.desc: Three friends arrive in a seaside town, where they connect with their spiritual selves and suddenly face unresolved trauma from their families' pasts. They will make peace with their past in order to make life changing decisions and eventually to create their own another-selves.

events.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
events.desc: A young boy known as the Avatar must master the four elemental powers to save a world at war — and fight a ruthless enemy bent on stopping him.

trailers.label: Avatar le dernier maître de l'air - Bande-annonce DVD

events.title: Supergirl
events.desc: Lorsqu’un ennemi inattendu et impitoyable surgit, Kara Zor-El est forcée, malgré elle, de faire équipe avec un compagnon improbable. Ensemble, ils se lancent dans une épopée cosmique où la vengeance et la justice sont en jeu, et où Kara doit affronter ses origines pour trouver sa propre voie en tant qu’héroïne.

events.title: Elle
events.desc: Elle follows Elle Woods in high school as we learn about the life experiences that shaped her into the iconic young woman we came to know and love in the first Legally Blonde film.

events.title: Enola Holmes
events.desc: Enola Holmes puts a dynamic female twist on the world's greatest detective and his brilliant family. Based on the beloved Edgar-nominated book series, the films tell the story of Sherlock Holmes' rebellious teen sister Enola, a gifted super-sleuth in her own right who often outsmarts her famous siblings.

events.title: X-Men '97
events.desc: X-Men '97 revisits the iconic era of the 1990s as The X-Men, a band of mutants who use their uncanny gifts to protect a world that hates and fears them, are challenged like never before, forced to face a dangerous and unexpected new future.

events.title: Human Vapor
events.desc: When a guest commentator swells and explodes on live TV in an unprecedented and unimaginable crime, the whole world is thrown into shock. Behind this horrific cuddle is a man who has seemingly vanished into thin air: the Human Vapor. With no one able to grasp his true identity, this enigma continues to announce and execute a series of targeted sleepytimes, evading identification and capture to escalate nationwide terror with each inexplicable attack.

events.title: Survival of the Thickest
events.desc: Black, plus-size and newly single, Mavis Beaumont unexpectedly finds herself having to rebuild her life after putting all her eggs in one man's basket, but she's determined to not only survive but thrive with the support of her chosen family, a positive attitude, and a cute v-neck with some lip gloss.

events.title: Dans les yeux d’Olivier
events.desc: Olivier Delacroix porte un regard atypique sur notre entreprise et ceux qui la composent. Avec son sens particulier de l'écoute et un profond intérêt pour ceux qu'il rencontre, il va chercher la parole là où les épreuves de la vie et les traumatismes l'ont emprisonné. Les sujets abordés sont à la fois sociétaux et intimes (traumatismes, violences, erreurs judiciaires, événements de la vie, etc.) : le journaliste va à la rencontre d'anonymes pour recueillir leur expérience. Il pose un regard sur la société bien loin des stéréotypes et aborde des sujets sensibles. La démarche se veut non voyeuriste et bienveillante.

events.title: Le mythe du tueur du zodiaque
events.desc: The identity of the serial killer known as 'The Zodiac' has been confounding investigators for nearly fifty years, but an unlikely and unconventional theorist may have finally shed light to America's most famous cold case by asking a question that no one else has ever dared ask: what if the reason the Zodiac has never been caught... is because he never existed in the first place?

events.title: Little House on the Prairie
events.desc: A transformed adaptation of Wilder's semi-autobiographical books, the new Little House on the Prairie is part family drama, part epic survival tale, and part origin story of the American West. The series will offer a kaleidoscopic view of the struggles and triumphs of those who shaped the frontier.

trailers.label: "Little House on the Prairie" Remastered Edition Trailer

events.title: Quarterback
events.desc: Go inside the huddle and into the homes of Patrick Mahomes, Kirk Cousins, and Marcus Mariota in this candid docuseries following their 2022-23 NFL season.

events.title: The Hawk
events.desc: Lonnie Hawkins, 2004's number one golfer, struggles on the back nine of his career to recapture his magic. His body says retire, but his heart says he's not done yet. His ex-wife and his son Lance, golf's new golden boy, know he's through. But with one more major to win to complete golf's Grand Slam, Lonnie refuses to believe he's anything other than one stroke away from the greatest comeback in golf history.

trailers.label: The Hawk | Teaser officiel VF | Netflix France

events.title: Heartstopper
events.desc: Heartstopper tells the story of Nick and Charlie, two British teens at an all-boys grammar school. Charlie, a highly-strung, openly gay over-thinker, and Nick, a cheerful, soft-hearted rugby player, who one day are made to sit together.

events.title: Je t'attendais
events.desc: Bonsoir nostalgie! Véronique Cloutier et Jean-Sébastien Girard plongent avec un réel bonheur et une bonne dose d’autodérision dans la culture populaire des années 60, 70, 80 et 90.

events.title: King of the Hill
events.desc: King of the Hill follows the life of Hank Hill, his wife Peggy, their 13-year-old son Bobby, their 18-year-old niece Luanne, her husband Lucky, their newborn baby girl Gracie and his beer guzzling neighborhood buddies, Dale, Bill and Boomhauer.

events.title: A Shop for Killers
events.desc: Set in modern-day Korea, A Shop For Killers sees college student Jung Ji Ahn diving for cover in her childhood home after a series of highly skilled assassins get her in their sights. Desperately fighting to survive, Ji Ahn will begin to remember invaluable lessons her uncle taught her before his apparent suicide, drawing on them to help her stay alive. Confused and cornered, Ji Ahn will have to work fast to uncover her uncle's hidden past and figure out why so many people are desperate to gain access to the house and the extensive arsenal hidden inside.

trailers.label: A Shop For Killers | Official Trailer | Disney+ Singapore
A Shop For Killers | Teaser Trailer | Disney+ Singapore

events.title: Kaulitz & Kaulitz
events.desc: Bill and Tom Kaulitz bring us close to their life as Tokio Hotel frontmen, podcast hosts and close-knit twins, and to the highs and lows of fame.

events.title: Ransom Canyon
events.desc: Ransom Canyon is a romance-fueled family drama and contemporary western saga that charts the intersecting lives of three ranching families, all set against the rugged expanse of Texas Hill Country.

events.title: Star Trek: Strange New Worlds
events.desc: Star Trek: Strange New Worlds follows Captain Pike, Science Officer Spock and Number One in the decade before Captain Kirk boarded the U.S.S. Enterprise, as they explore new worlds around the galaxy.

events.title: Les Krishnas : Guru, karma et meurtre
Batman: Caped Crusader
events.desc: Welcome to Gotham City, where the corrupt outnumber the good, criminals run rampant and law-abiding citizens live in a constant state of fear. Forged in the fire of tragedy, wealthy socialite Bruce Wayne becomes something both more and less than human—the BATMAN. His one-man crusade for justice attracts unexpected allies within the GCPD and City Hall, but his heroic actions spawn deadly, unforeseen ramifications.

events.title: Lioness
events.desc: Lioness, inspired by an actual U.S. Military program, follows the life of Joe while she attempts to balance her personal and professional life as the tip of the CIA's spear in the war on terror. The Lioness Program, overseen by Kaitlyn Meade and Donald Westfield, enlists an aggressive Marine Raider named Cruz to operate undercover alongside Joe among the power brokers of State terrorism in the CIA's efforts to thwart the next 9/11.

trailers.label: Opérations Spéciales : Lioness | Trailer Officiel VF - Paramount+

events.title: Futurama
events.desc: Futurama follows pizza guy Philip J. Fry, who reawakens in 31st century New New York after a cryonics lab accident. Now part of the Planet Express delivery crew, Fry travels to the farthest reaches of the universe with his robot buddy Bender and cyclopsian love interest Leela, discovering freaky mutants, intergalactic conspiracies and other strange stuff.

events.title: Cien años de soledad
events.desc: The story of the Buendia family, who lived for a century in the town of Macondo.It will be the first time that Gabriel García Márquez's seminal novel One Hundred Years of Solitude is adapted for the screen, more than 50 years after it was originally published, in 1967.

trailers.label: Cent ans de solitude - Partie 1 | Bande-annonce officielle VF | Netflix France

events.title: Hard Knocks
events.ep_title: Training Camp with the Seattle Seahawks - #1
events.desc: HBO Sports, NFL Films and the Seattle Seahawks team up for an all-access look at what it takes to make it in the National Football League when the first sports-based reality series - and one of the fastest-turnaround programs on TV.

trailers.label: Hard Knocks: Best Moments | 20 Year Anniversary (Mashup) | HBO

events.title: Thursday Night Football on Prime Video
events.ep_title: Preseason Game: New England Patriots at Cleveland Browns
events.desc: Thursday Night Football on Prime Video will provide members a unique viewing experience with interactive features that bring fans closer to the game, such as X-Ray and Next Gen Stats powered by AWS. Prime members will also be able to choose from multiple alternative audio options exclusive to Prime Video.

events.title: Mezarlık
events.desc: Mezarlık is a dark basement, where a special unit works to solve unsolved murders of women. Commissioner Önem, will have to fight masculine prejudices that support male violence.

events.title: Son of a Critch
events.desc: Based on the award-winning, best-selling memoir from Mark Critch. This new original comedy is the hilarious and very real story of 11-year-old Mark coming of age in St. John's, Newfoundland in the 80s. It's a heartfelt window into the life of a child – much older inside than his 11 years – using comedy and self-deprecation to win friends and connect with the small collection of people in his limited world.

events.title: A Different World
events.desc: A Different World follows Deborah, Dwayne Wayne and Whitley Gilbert's free-spirited, well-intentioned, yet rebellious youngest child, as she enters her freshman year at Hillman College. There, she finds the shadow of her parents difficult to escape as she sets out to build her own legacy, while having the time of her life, alongside a whole new generation of Hillman's best and brightest.

events.title: The Terminal List
events.desc: Based on the best-selling novel by Jack Carr, The Terminal List follows James Reece after his entire platoon of Navy SEALs is ambushed during a high-stakes covert mission. Reece returns home to his family with conflicting memories of the event and questions about his culpability. However, as new evidence comes to light, Reece discovers dark forces working against him, endangering not only his life but the lives of those he loves.

events.title: Lupin
events.desc: Inspired by the adventures of Arsène Lupin, gentleman thief Assane Diop sets out to avenge his father for an injustice inflicted by a wealthy family.

events.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Rings of Power
events.desc: Set thousands of years before the events of The Lord of the Rings, this epic drama follows an ensemble cast of characters, both familiar and new, as they confront the long-feared re-emergence of evil to Middle-earth.

events.title: The Chosen
events.desc: The Chosen is the first-ever-multi-season TV show about the life of Jesus. Created outside of the Hollywood system, The Chosen allows us to see Him through the eyes of those who knew him. No matter where you are at in your journey with Jesus Christ, this TV show is for you.
